{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324105110A99797F6440D9F8DF6C3"}"},"total":189},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617099661354451737","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一部标准的甜水小说📖，在看这本书之前，我也大约看了有百八十部小说，这本小说也是在阅览了众多小说以后，能够让我从头看到尾的。个人觉得非常的扣紧主题，也不拖沓。打发时间的小甜水小说是非常不错的，嗯，但是有点小缺憾的就是，可能在书中剧情的某些逻辑方面可能没有那么完善，就是毫无缘由的一种偏爱吧。不过也非常的不错了。[学会了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773496022,"group_id":"7518111609131125822","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1UggvaD8tMESB5b+B5tArY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ba9a42ca97b54a8495b166e6d59e9994~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776877586&x-signature=Y7KhsgEAKb8XCtzIotxo6c%2BUAn8%3D","user_id":"110437653950","user_name":"用户淇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110437653950","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7518111609131125822","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿书+宫斗+攻心+双洁+HE+不虐+甜宠】
作者不太会写文案，进来瞧一瞧吧。
太子沈卿尘年少成名，且性子沉稳果断，十二岁时已经在军中历练，六年后受了重伤归来，整个太医院束手无策，皇后濒临绝望之际，信了民间的冲喜之说。
当即命人下聘于丞相之女，也就是太子的青梅竹马，然而丞相之女柳眉昭却突然病重，下不来床。
太子的病情耽搁不得，皇后着急之下，册封了吏部侍郎之女萧晗烟为太子良娣，入东宫救太子。
萧晗烟年芳十五，已是出落的楚楚动人，这也是她穿书的第五年，她也是偶然才得知她穿进了一本名为【太子的白月光】的书里。
书中太子与太子妃青梅竹马，郎情妾意，两人相看两不厌。
而萧晗烟却成了那个炮灰，在东宫郁郁而终。
而现代来的萧晗烟在与沈卿尘相处中，两人相知相爱，情缠三世。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/be9fc6856e27a62b4b84ccb3c367ee41","author":"不爱拉倒m","author_id":"","book_id":"7518111609131125822","book_name":"穿书之娇媚良娣上位记","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#703028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7519607152718119486","read_count":"55745","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"350108"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"158","tags":"宫斗宅斗,古代言情,穿越,穿书,HE,双洁","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cd9315d493f9d1268ae7ffcad113fe9a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779504670&x-signature=wlsBf6CqC2U%2FFkT36EsRJ%2BroZ74%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2850373076263309","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"160"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324105110A99797F6440D9F8DF6C3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_coun ":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3816,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1189},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7583550736251814681","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的特别好看，第一次在追更的时候还把前面章节反复看解馋的。女主就是善良也很会装，男主满心满眼都是女主，男主母亲也特别喜欢女主，甚至让女主叫自己母后，还会帮女主抢男主（其实不用抢男主也是一心想跟女主待一起的，只不过有的场合男主母亲开口遮掩方便一点），男主是嫡子，且没有同龄兄弟，地位稳固，他父亲很快就禅位了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765686837,"group_id":"7518111609131125822","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8ivhprPTzTF52Pk8ui11pDzSbtiEzfvDNmXEpTW+YUt","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4fcc07e30c094c16b7dd87565ed0862e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776873630&x-signature=2inypBl98aHMFlZ%2FmxkmGSzCB7A%3D","user_id":"2959538370657165","user_name":"Alina雨林"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2959538370657165","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1733723921,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7518111609131125822","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿书+宫斗+攻心+双洁+HE+不虐+甜宠】
